final:
module RefModule(input clk, input reset, input enable, input in, output reg [4-1:0] out);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if(reset) begin
            out <= 4'b0;
        end else if(enable) begin
            out <= out + 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
